plugin_desc: ARRIS Cadant E6 CMTS access-device SNMP collection using the CADANT-CMTS-EQUIPMENT-MIB private equipment tree under enterprise PEN 4998. Beyond the shared Access SNMP floor for MIB-II uptime and IF-MIB 64-bit HC interface traffic, it collects vendor health deltas for relative card temperature, fan ambient temperature, PEM power LED status, disk-volume usage percentage, disk-volume usage level and card primary state. Card temperature is a relative 1-10 scale, so fan ambient temperature is the only Celsius temperature metric. DOCSIS port/channel/service counters are not promoted to shared device-health metrics.
name: Access

metrics.name: device_temperature_celsius
metrics.description: Fan ambient temperature from cerFanAmbientTemperature, read directly in degrees Celsius.

metrics.name: device_card_temperature_level
metrics.description: Relative card temperature from cerCardTemperature. Values 1-10 represent coolest to hottest; 999 means no report.

metrics.name: device_card_state
metrics.description: Card primary state from cerCardPrState, normalized so that in-service is healthy and every other value is abnormal.

metrics.name: device_psu_state
metrics.description: Power entry-module LED status from cerPemLedStatus, normalized so that normal(1) is healthy and alarm(2) or unknown values are abnormal.

metrics.name: device_disk_usage
metrics.description: Disk volume usage percentage from cerDiskVolumeUsagePercentage, aggregated with the highest volume usage per device.

metrics.name: device_disk_state
metrics.description: Disk volume usage level from cerDiskVolumeUsageLevel, normalized so that normal(1) is healthy and minor/major/critical or unknown values are abnormal.
